title: EDIF backend not recognising my hadder edif module

features.name: module instantiation with positional port connections
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation using positional (ordered) port connections rather than named connections
features.snippet:
hadder u0 (a, b, u0_sum_out, u0_carry_out);
hadder u1 (ci, u0_sum_out, s, u1_carry_out);

features.name: hierarchical module design with multiple instances
features.description: Code should include a hierarchical design where one module instantiates multiple instances of another module

features.name: simple combinational XOR and AND logic
features.description: Code should include simple combinational logic using XOR and AND operators with continuous assignments
features.snippet:
assign s = a ^ b;
assign c = a & b;

features.name: multi-bit concatenation in assignment
features.description: Code should include a concatenation assignment where multiple signals are combined on the left-hand side
features.snippet: assign {led_4, led_3, led_2, led_1, led_0} = {b3_carry, b3_sum, b2_sum, b1_sum, b0_sum};
